description:
## Memory Leak Confirmed - Production

**Runtime:** ~42 hours
**RSS:** 449MB (1.5h) → 766MB (42h) = +317MB
**VSZ:** 9GB (1.5h) → 60GB (42h) = 6.7x growth

**Growth Rate:** ~7-8 MB/hr RSS

---

## Environment
- FreeBSD (no pmap/proc)
- 188 feeds, 14,673 items
- Cache: 38MB only (tiny)
- WAL files: 15MB (not the leak)

---

## Diagnosis

**NOT the leak:**
- ✅ Cache (38MB, bounded)
- ✅ DB items (14K, bounded)
- ✅ WAL files (15MB, bounded)
- ✅ Threads (1 thread only)

**IS the leak:**
- ❌ RSS growing linearly (~7MB/hr)
- ❌ VSZ growing (60GB+)
- Likely: Crystal heap or actor-related

---

## Actions

1. Restart process to clear memory
2. Add memory profiling to identify leak source:
   - Log RSS every hour: `ps -o pid,rss,vsz`
   - Check actor mailbox sizes if exposed
   - Look for unbounded collections in code
3. Consider GC tuning or heap profiling

---

## Priority: CRITICAL

Will OOM in ~30-40 more hours at current growth rate.

**Assigned:** kritoke
title: Memory growth - 9GB VIRT after 1.5h runtime
